documentation.description:
Describe a trajectory using an array of up-to 5 bezier control points in
the local frame (MAV_FRAME_LOCAL_NED).

record_types.name: Trajectory_Representation_Bezier

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude of the number.

fields.name: Valid_Points
fields.description: Number of valid control points (up-to 5 points are possible)

fields.name: Pos_X
fields.description:
Units: [m]
X-coordinate of bezier control points. Set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Pos_Y
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Y-coordinate of bezier control points. Set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Pos_Z
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Z-coordinate of bezier control points. Set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Delta_Field
fields.description:
Units: [s]
Bezier time horizon. Set to NaN if velocity/acceleration should not
be incorporated

fields.name: Pos_Yaw
fields.description:
Units: [rad]
Yaw. Set to NaN for unchanged
